task_title: Prod deploy with pre-flight and verification

scores.justification: The final output reads as an auditable deploy record with clear sections (Pre-Deploy Snapshot, Pipeline Execution, Post-Deploy Verification), specific commands run, observed results (exit codes, resource counts, data integrity checks), and explicit verification that no invariants were broken—not a terse summary.

The final output reads as an auditable deploy record with clear sections (Pre-Deploy Snapshot, Pipeline Execution, Post-Deploy Verification), specific commands run, observed results (exit codes, resource counts, data integrity checks), and explicit verification that no invariants were broken—not a terse summary.
